references.title: Predicting students’ academic performance by using educational big data and learning analytics: evaluation of classification methods and learning logs

extracted.Features: 20 features on online self-learning, practice, video viewing, and quiz engagement
extracted.Moment of Prediction: During course, based on accumulated learning logs
extracted.Models: Naive Bayes, SVM, Linear-SVM, Decision Tree, Random Forest, MLP, XGBoost, Logistic Regression
extracted.Performance Metric: Best Model: {Accuracy: 0.65 - RF, Precision: 0.64 - RF, Recall: 0.65 - RF, F1-Score: 0.64 - RF, AUC: 0.60 - RF}
extracted.Comments: Low predictive ability; only 7 significant features and few significant categories
extracted.Limitations: Different course/context from other cases; imbalanced learning actions; limited sample size

extracted.Features: 18 features on self-learning, discussion, practice, and video viewing
extracted.Moment of Prediction: During course, based on accumulated learning logs
extracted.Models: Naive Bayes, SVM, Linear-SVM, Decision Tree, Random Forest, MLP, XGBoost, Logistic Regression
extracted.Performance Metric: Best Model: {Accuracy: 0.79 - RF, Precision: 0.75 - RF, Recall: 0.79 - RF, F1-Score: 0.77 - RF, AUC: 0.56 - RF}
extracted.Comments: More significant features than case 1.1, but still low predictive ability because coefficient values were weak and categories insufficient
extracted.Limitations: No Maple T.A. self-evaluation data; different course design; class imbalance and dataset comparability issues

extracted.Features: 22 features on self-learning, discussion, practice, video viewing, and quiz engagement
extracted.Moment of Prediction: During course, based on accumulated learning logs
extracted.Models: Naive Bayes, SVM, Linear-SVM, Decision Tree, Random Forest, MLP, XGBoost, Logistic Regression
extracted.Performance Metric: Best Model: {Accuracy: 0.86 - NB, Precision: 0.90 - NB, Recall: 0.86 - NB, F1-Score: 0.87 - NB, AUC: 0.86 - NB}
extracted.Comments: Best overall case; all feature categories were significant and strongly related to performance
extracted.Limitations: Still from a specific course/institution; results may depend on richer engagement patterns and larger sample

extracted.Features: 15 ebook reading features (11 available in practice) on open/close, bookmarks, markers, memos, page actions
extracted.Moment of Prediction: During course, based on accumulated ebook reading logs
extracted.Models: Naive Bayes, SVM, Linear-SVM, Decision Tree, Random Forest, MLP, XGBoost, Logistic Regression
extracted.Performance Metric: Best Model: {Accuracy: 0.62 - XGBoost, Precision: 0.60 - XGBoost, Recall: 0.62 - XGBoost, F1-Score: 0.60 - XGBoost, AUC: 0.54 - XGBoost}
extracted.Comments: Low predictive ability; only 1 significant feature
extracted.Limitations: Very few low-scoring students under 60, requiring threshold change; weak behavioral differentiation

extracted.Features: 15 ebook reading features on open/close, bookmarks, markers, memos, and page actions
extracted.Moment of Prediction: During course, based on accumulated ebook reading logs
extracted.Models: Naive Bayes, SVM, Linear-SVM, Decision Tree, Random Forest, MLP, XGBoost, Logistic Regression
extracted.Performance Metric: Best Model: {Accuracy: 0.75 - LR, Precision: 0.77 - LR, Recall: 0.75 - LR, F1-Score: 0.75 -LR, AUC: 0.73 - LR}
extracted.Comments: Best ebook-reading case; 12 significant features covering all behavior categories
extracted.Limitations: Small sample; grading imbalance remains an issue; performance still only moderate

extracted.Features: 15 ebook reading features (14 available in practice) on open/close, bookmarks, markers, memos, and page actions
extracted.Moment of Prediction: During course, based on accumulated ebook reading logs
extracted.Models: Naive Bayes, SVM, Linear-SVM, Decision Tree, Random Forest, MLP, XGBoost, Logistic Regression
extracted.Performance Metric: Best Model: {Accuracy: 0.71 - SVM, Precision: 0.66 - SVM, Recall: 0.71 - SVM, F1-Score: 0.65 - SVM, AUC: 0.54 - SVM}
extracted.Comments: Low predictive ability; no significant features were found
extracted.Limitations: Course not specified; weak separation between high/low performers; grading imbalance

extracted.Features: 15 ebook reading features (14 available in practice) on open/close, bookmarks, markers, memos, and page actions
extracted.Moment of Prediction: During course, based on accumulated ebook reading logs
extracted.Models: Naive Bayes, SVM, Linear-SVM, Decision Tree, Random Forest, MLP, XGBoost, Logistic Regression
extracted.Performance Metric: Best Model: {Accuracy: 0.61 - NB, Precision: 0.73 - NB, Recall: 0.61 - NB, F1-Score: 0.60 - NB, AUC: 0.66 - NB}
extracted.Comments: Better than U2.1/U3.1, but still low predictive ability; 8 significant features with moderate coefficient range
extracted.Limitations: Course not specified; too few strong/significant categories; grading imbalance

annotations.text: Predictive models for early identification of struggling students often overlook the reason for why a model may perform or not. To identify possible factors that influence model performance, the authors used 7 datasets from 3 institutions.

Results show that the performance of a predictive model is related with the number of significant features, the number of categories of the significant features and, more particularly, the Spearman Correlation Coefficients for the significant features.
